race.comment: DEEP DISCRETION (7) wasn't far away at this track last start and comes back to trip that she's been successful at previously. Turner hops back on board and he has a good record when riding the mare. Can get back to winning ways. MOORUMBINE (2) was strong first-up without trialling, beaten 1.5L there. He'll be much fitter for that effort and the draw is ideal. Can go on with the job now. SAFE HUSTLE (3) is better than he showed last time out where fading out of contention. Webster's claims comes in handy here and back to 1100m is a big tick. Can bounce back in a big way. ENTICING (10) was in the finish as a 25/1 chance fresh and he creates some interest. TYCOON DEMON (6) missed as favourite last time out and can put his best foot forward here.
